raw_consumer_statement: I reported fraud to my credit card company in the amount of {$15000.00}, made in XXXX transactions on the same date. My credit card company denied my claim stating the chip was used and that it was verified that I had the card in my possession at the time of the transactions. When I originally called, the way they were stating questions was confusing and resulted in a multiple mistakes such as deactivating my mobile account access even though I did not request that, theyre claiming I stated that I had my card in my possession at the time of the transactions. I may have said I would have assumed it was but I would not have know, the company that charged these to my account should be investigated for fraud as well. They stated it was a cleaning company, which Ive personally never used one ever.
